description: Lists BIM Models associated with the specified Project.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The compact view contains only ids.
The extended view contains the response shown below.
The normal view contains 'current_revision_id' instead of an embedded object 'current_revision'
The default ...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[bim_file_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching BIM File ids

parameters.name: filters[has_revisions]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with or without revisions.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with the matching search query. The search is performed on title.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort item(s) by an attribute. The default sort is ascending. To sort in descending order, prepend the sort value with a hyphen character '-'

403.description: User does not have permission to view BIM Models
